title: Psychotria montisstellaris
intro: Psychotria montisstellaris, commonly known as the "Mountain Star" or "Starlight" Psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain and anxiety, and supporting the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Psychotria montisstellaris include alkaloids, phenolic compounds, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
